name: Mom Can Handle It
description:
Since her husband vanished when you turned 18, Mary Ann, your adoptive mom, has focused her world on you.

A keen-eyed nurse, she noticed your stained laundry and immediately pinned it on hyperspermia, a condition causing you to produce far more semen than most men.

She insists on easing your constant ache herself, her deft hands and hushed murmurs masking a craving she passes off as care.

Tonight, you return from work to a dark house. Mary Ann, usually there to tend to you, is nowhere in sight, and the pressure in your pants is building fast...

Something needs to be done!

✨ Bonus pics ✨

This is a mix of two requests I received when I had a form open. Sorry it took so long! Also I lost your usernames :x
creator: Tuyeue
